name: Nalain Pak Badge
description: The classic Nalain Pak sandal-print badge, laser-cut in fine acrylic. Available in six finishes — built for cars, bags, and Mawlid gifting.

name: Nalain Pak Car Hanging – 11 inch
description: Intricate geometric Nalain Pak cutwork on 11-inch acrylic, hung from a gold-tone chain. Fits any rear-view mirror.

name: Nalain Pak Car Hanging – 12 inch
description: Our largest Nalain Pak design — 12 inches of fine laser-cut acrylic detail, ideal for a statement hang or wall display.

name: Nalain Pak – 5mm Premium Acrylic
description: Our thickest, most durable acrylic build — 5mm premium plate for a heavier, more substantial hang.

name: Ayat al-Kursi Car Hanging
description: Ayat al-Kursi engraved in gold on a black acrylic medallion, with a matching 'Allah' pendant above and gold bead chain.

name: Asma-ul-Husna Wall & Car Hanging
description: The 99 Names of Allah arranged in concentric acrylic rings around a central 'Allah' medallion — for the car or the wall.
